ul.li: model-agnostic export - any HF model -> ONNX (Optimum)
two sim inputs - nonlinear_config.yaml (accuracy) + archx workload.yaml (cost)
ONNX -> archx converter - archx keeps its own YAML for arbitrary workloads
additive - delegates to the existing inference lifecycle; instrumentation unchanged
pluggable window - strategy (TopK / BruteForce / Greedy) x criterion (auto / max / min / centroid)
calibration bypass - Llama2_7B == original profile_tensor, bit-for-bit
extensible: new model = 1 adapter, new method = 1 strategy/criterion

g.text: window_size, exp_dim, lut_window_size, strategy, criterion, calibration
bitwidths, lut_*, array_config, variant, workload_format, seq lens
dim, hidden_dim, heads, kv_heads, layers, vocab
